intent: Demonstrate that evaluating without an intact response binding violates evidence integrity.
positive_scenarios: take evaluate from dispatched while response_intact is false
forbidden_scenarios: infer response binding from phase alone
repair the mutant or weaken EvaluationRequiresIntactResponse during evaluation
anti_vacuity_obligations: Evaluation is enabled in the initial state.
The evaluated state with response_intact false is reachable in exactly one transition.

change_control.rule: Changing intent, properties, source bytes, witness shape, or oracle requires a new suite version.
